commit.message:
docs: add planning docs and update progress

Add component audit, refactoring plan, and theme study documents.
Remove unused frontend container from docker-compose (runs locally).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: restrict group collapse/expand to chevron click only

Prevent accidental collapse when clicking elsewhere on the group
header (e.g. after editing a cell). Only the chevron arrow button
triggers toggle now.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

design: minimal type-aware empty states for all editable cells

Replace verbose "Cliquer pour modifier..." with quiet type-specific
indicators: dash for text/number, persistent icons for date/phone/
email/location, muted User icon without text, "—" for empty selects.
Icons always visible as anchors so empty→filled transition is smooth.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: replace DossierFilters with ColumnFilters on dossiers page

Extract matchesFilter to shared utility, update dossiers page to use
the same per-column filtering system as board pages. Remove old
DossierFilters component (status + date range only) in favor of
ColumnFilters (type-aware operators for all column types).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

design: add dark/light theme system with next-themes

Install next-themes, add ThemeProvider + ThemeToggle, define CSS
design tokens for both modes in globals.css, migrate ~1500 hardcoded
colors to semantic tokens across all components. Sidebar is light in
light mode, dark navy in dark mode. All color-coded elements (badges,
file types, status indicators) use dark: variants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Rename package from com.notification to org.notification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Grafana dashboard by setting datasource UID and enabling histogram metrics

Dashboard panels referenced datasource uid "prometheus" but the
provisioned datasource had no explicit UID. Also enabled percentiles
histogram for HTTP server requests so p95/p99 latency panels have data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Redis cache serialization by using JSON instead of JDK serializer

The default JdkSerializationRedisSerializer requires cached objects to
implement Serializable. Entity classes (User, Device, NotificationTemplate)
don't, causing every @Cacheable call to fail with SerializationException
and resulting in 100% load test failures. Switch to
GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer. Also promote load-client error
logging from DEBUG to ERROR for better visibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace wildcard imports with explicit single-class imports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add healthcheck to notification-server for load-client readiness

The load-client was starting before the notification-server Spring Boot
app was ready, causing 100% request failures. Use actuator health
endpoint as healthcheck and require service_healthy condition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Docker build by generating per-service settings.gradle

Each Dockerfile was copying the shared settings.gradle which references
all subprojects, but only one subproject's source was available during
build. Generate a minimal settings.gradle with only the target subproject.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: connect settings page to Supabase + settings API route

- New /api/settings route: GET loads profile/workspace settings,
  PUT saves name, LLM config, privacy, notifications to Supabase
- Settings page: loads real user data (name, email, LLM config)
  on mount, saves changes via API, shows loading state on buttons
- Dynamic avatar initials from user name
- Remove hardcoded "Jean Dupont" / "jean@example.com"

commit.message:
chore(plan): mark Stream 2 Horizon-2 items as completed

All three Stream 2 items [x]:
- Dual-NIC hardware spec (docs/research/HORIZON2_HARDWARE_SPEC.md)
- XDP_REDIRECT prototype (src/network/ebpf/experimental/)
- AF_XDP RFC + Go bridge (docs/research/RFC_AF_XDP_INTEGRATION.md)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(horizon-2): XDP_REDIRECT prototype + AF_XDP bridge + hardware spec

Stream 2 — Performance Campaign (post-GA):
- src/network/ebpf/experimental/xdp_redirect_prototype.c: BPF program
  using BPF_MAP_TYPE_DEVMAP + bpf_redirect_map to bypass kernel stack
  for mesh transit traffic on MESH_PORT 26969; per-CPU perf_stats counters
- src/network/ebpf/experimental/afxdp_bridge.go: Go bridge prototype
  linking to pinned XSKMAP; UMEM allocation pending i40e/ixgbe hardware
- docs/research/HORIZON2_HARDWARE_SPEC.md: dual-NIC testbed spec
  (Intel X710-DA2 / X520-DA2 / mlx5), DAC cable topology, pktgen setup
- docs/research/RFC_AF_XDP_INTEGRATION.md: XDP_REDIRECT + AF_XDP RFC,
  XSKMAP design, zero-copy vs copy-mode, Go integration, honest gate:
  1M+ PPS requires Native XDP on i40e/ixgbe, not achievable on virtio

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

chore(swarm): add Horizon-2 scope to gemini agent

src/network/ebpf/experimental/ and docs/research/ added to gemini's
ownership for XDP_REDIRECT and AF_XDP prototype work.

feat(release): add v1.1_GA_MANIFEST.json — official GA freeze artifact

Assembles the VERIFIED / VERIFIED IN CI / NOT CLAIMED boundary:
- VERIFIED: eBPF 49RX/142k TX + 99.8M/s Go-level, 5G E2E VPS, Ghost
  Protocol, PQC FIPS 203/204, Zero-Trust SPIRE, CI keyless provenance
  (run 22822503867), MaaS 10k+ unit tests
- VERIFIED IN CI: Rekor transparency log, MTTR synthetic baseline
  (MTTD=10.6s MTTR=52.7s), Go dataplane bench gate
- NOT CLAIMED: 1M+ PPS hardware, 24h soak, K8s CNI, carrier-grade 5G,
  Rekor log indices
- Open: GA-001 K8s CNI, GA-002 Rekor indices
- v1.1_GA_READINESS.md: keyless signing → VERIFIED, soak test documented,
  GA Freeze verdict declared, freeze commit referenced

fix: accept Llama 3.2 license before vision inference (#331)

* debug: add vision error details to response (temporary)

* debug: surface vision result details in response

* debug: include _debug in response payload

* fix: accept Llama 3.2 license before vision inference + remove debug code

Root cause: @cf/meta/llama-3.2-11b-vision-instruct requires a one-time
license acceptance call (prompt: "agree") before inference works (error 5016).

- Add license acceptance try/catch in both vision routes
- Remove temporary debug variables and _debug response field
- Update test mock to handle the extra AI.run() call

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: cache Llama 3.2 license acceptance in KV to avoid per-request overhead

Address Greptile review: license acceptance was firing on every request.
Now checks KV flag first, only calls AI.run(agree) if not cached.
TTL: 30 days.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: include model name in license KV key to track model changes

Address Greptile review: static KV key would silently skip license
acceptance if VISION_MODEL is changed. Key is now derived from
the model constant.

commit.message:
Fix I-token detection to catch all tokenizer variants

Replace hardcoded token ID {1083} with per-token string comparison.
Decodes each token and checks decoded.strip() == 'I', which catches
all SentencePiece variants — ▁I after spaces, bare I after quotes,
parens, sentence starts, etc. Applied to both extract.py and
extract_shard.py.

commit.message:
feat(seo): slug URLs, sitemap.xml, full OpenGraph + JSON-LD (v1.4)

Migration 036 — adds slug, is_indexed, last_indexed_at to threads.
Slugs generated via NFD accent-stripping + UUID suffix for uniqueness.
UUID-based URLs redirect 301 to canonical slug URL automatically.

SEO stack:
- /sitemap.xml — dynamic, all public threads with lastmod + priority
- Thread pages — og:url, og:image (community banner), canonical, JSON-LD
  DiscussionForumPosting with url/dateModified/isPartOf
- Category pages — full og:* + canonical
- Layout — og:site_name + theme-color on all pages
- robots.txt already pointed to /sitemap.xml (now live)

Bug fixes (slug cascade):
- forums.ts GET /threads/:id — use thread.id for posts/tags/views queries
- forums.ts POST /posts — use thread.id (not slug) for FK insert + ban check
- forums.ts PATCH /threads/:id — use thread.id for isMod/update/remove/tags
- Zod CreatePostBody: thread_id accepts string (not uuid-only) — resolved server-side
- +page.server.ts: polls query uses thread.id not params.thread

scripts/regen-slugs.ts — one-shot script to regenerate all slugs with
correct NFD normalization (fixes ç→c, é→e, etc. for existing threads).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix iOS audio: webkitAudioContext fallback + silent buffer unlock

iOS Safari (and all iOS browsers) require webkitAudioContext prefix and
a synchronous silent buffer start to unlock audio within user gesture.
Also adds statechange listener to auto-resume after app backgrounding.

to explicitly allow Bash/Read/Write/Edit/Glob/Grep tools. Enable
show_full_output to make denials visible in logs.

commit.message:
Fix file path validation to use absolute paths matching playback logic

The validateFilePaths check was calling RNFS.exists() on relative paths
(e.g. "UUID/filename.mp3"), which always fails. Now prepends
RNFS.DocumentDirectoryPath to match how convertMeditationToTrack()
constructs paths for playback.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(coordinator): priority-based action selection

Issues now sorted by priority labels (P0 > P1 > P2 > P3 > unlabeled)
instead of oldest-first. P0-critical issues jump ahead of routine PR
reviews. P1-high issues prioritized over stale PR management.

- Add priorityRank() and sortByPriority() helpers
- P0-critical issues inserted at Priority 2b (before PR reviews)
- P1-high issues inserted at Priority 4b (before stale PR pinging)
- Priority 6/6b issue selection sorted by priority then age

fix: Quake-style movement - walk 4.5, sprint 8, bunny hop air control

- airMaxSpeed 0.8 - low air cap preserves momentum for bunny hop
- airAccel 30 - high enough for Quake-style strafing
- movement.js: airMaxSpeed cap separates air control from ground maxSpeed

commit.message:
fix: handle spawn ENOENT and stale worktree paths after container restart

- Add 'error' event handler on spawn to catch ENOENT (claude not found
  or cwd doesn't exist) instead of crashing the process
- Validate worktree path exists on disk before reusing; recreate from
  bare repo if /tmp was wiped by container restart
- Previous revision crashed on boot because stale worktree_path from
  old container pointed to /tmp dir that no longer existed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Register tab title and Contact/Message Owner messaging flow

- Add Helmet to RegisterPage so browser tab shows "Create Account" instead of "Sign In"
- Update Contact Owner and Message Owner buttons to pass owner ID via URL param (?to=)
- Rewrite MessagesPage to capture recipient from URL, look up owner info from Firestore,
  and auto-open chat panel for new or existing conversations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: material detail fallback when catalog almacen codes differ from SAP codes

The catalog_almacenes uses codes like 0001/0012 while SAP tables (stock,
pedidos_sap, materiales_bbdd) use AA001/AA100/II000. When filtering by
almacen returned 0 results, fallback to filtering by centro only so stock,
MRP and consumption data is displayed correctly.

Also replace agSetColumnFilter (enterprise) with community filter in
Stock.jsx and ConsignmentPrograms.jsx to fix AG Grid error #200.

The single useEffect was cancelling its own timeout on re-render when
setPhase triggered cleanup. Split into two effects so each phase
transition manages its own timer independently.

functions (computeMeiText, computeMeiGuaranteed), and category switch
clearing. Nakago section remains nihonto-only.

Auto-clone repo if missing when creating worktree

Prevents "Cannot use simple-git on a directory that does not exist" when
the clone directory is missing (e.g. after settings reset or first run
on a new machine). The worktree creation now clones automatically if
the repo hasn't been cloned yet.

Reorganise explore depth controls into a dedicated row

Move Shallower/Deeper buttons and dots to a second row below the main
actions. Dots now sit between the two buttons. Both depth buttons are
fixed width (w-28) so they match in size. Buttons stay rendered but
disabled at min/max depth instead of conditionally disappearing.
